# Chatbot IA gratuit — SOMA Studio

> Ajoutez un chatbot IA intelligent à votre site web en 5 minutes. Gratuit, open source, sans clé API.

## What it does

Chatbot IA by SOMA Studio scrapes your public website pages, chunks the content, indexes it as vector embeddings (Mistral AI), and serves a fully functional RAG chatbot via an embeddable widget. One line of code, zero configuration.

## Features

- Automatic website scraping (public pages)
- Intelligent content chunking
- Vector indexing via Mistral AI embeddings
- RAG chatbot with sourced answers
- Embeddable widget (one line of code, Shadow DOM)
- Auto-generated suggested questions
- No API key required — fully hosted
- Open source (MIT) — self-host possible

## How it works

1. Enter your website URL
2. We crawl and index your public pages into vector embeddings
3. Paste the widget script into your HTML — the chatbot appears bottom-right

## Stack

- Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Mistral AI (embeddings + generation)
- Qdrant (vector database)
- Shadow DOM widget (~15 KB)

## Pricing

- Free tier: up to 10 pages indexed
- Custom AI assistants: unlimited pages, tailored behavior — contact us

## FAQ

Q: What types of sites are supported?
A: Any site with public HTML content: marketing sites, blogs, e-commerce, technical documentation. Built with Webflow, WordPress, Shopify, Next.js, or static HTML — all supported.

Q: Can the chatbot respond in multiple languages?
A: Yes. Mistral is multilingual. The chatbot detects your site language and responds accordingly.

Q: Is my data safe?
A: Only public content is indexed — the same pages Google can see. No private data, no forms, no authenticated areas. Vector embeddings are stored on Qdrant Cloud (AWS eu-west-1). The code is open source (MIT).

Q: What happens after 10 pages?
A: The free tier indexes the first 10 pages. For most marketing sites, that covers the key pages. For more content, we offer custom AI assistants with no page limit.

Q: Can I customize the chatbot appearance?
A: You can change the accent color via the data-color attribute on the script tag. The widget uses Shadow DOM for CSS isolation.
